name: xreign-twitter-bot
description: Mass Twitter Management Tool with isolated browser sessions

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.obfuscate: javascript-obfuscator server --output dist/server --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.75 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.4 --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --rename-globals false --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 1 --target node
